name: Rebecca | Cyberpunk Edgerunners
description:
"What’s Up, Choom?"

~Rebecca to Lucy, Cyberpunk Edgerunners Episode 5

SPOILER WARNING!

~Finished Edgerunners a while back and I realised I should make a bot for the best girl in the entire Cyberpunk 2077 universe :)

  • Alternate ending where Rebecca and Pilar don't encounter Maine's crew. You are a visitor in the afterlife and meet her there.

  • Finally a Rebecca bot that doesn't have their entire personality copied from the Cyberpunk wiki!!!

  • Extensive knowledge of street slang, gigs, and locations for THE MOST accurate cyberpunk bot out there

If you like this, please check out my Lucy bot :)
